question: Can a fixed monthly spot-only top-2 rule over five mature altcoins, filtered by positive 90-day own momentum, retain positive cost-adjusted returns and improve drawdown through development, independent evaluation and confirmation?
rebalance: first UTC daily open of each calendar month using only prior close data
development_gate: data PASS; 90d base and stress total >0; at least one positive calendar year; max drawdown at least 10 percentage points better than equal-weight buy-and-hold; 60d and 120d base totals >0; turnover <=50
evaluation_gate: 90d base and stress total >0; at least one positive calendar year; max drawdown better than equal-weight buy-and-hold; 60d and 120d base totals >0
confirmation_gate: 90d base and stress total >=0; max drawdown better than equal-weight buy-and-hold; 60d and 120d base totals >=0
holdout_release_rule: Fetch evaluation only after development passes; fetch confirmation only after fixed evaluation passes; never change economic rules or gates after release
known_exposure: No XRPUSDT, ADAUSDT, LTCUSDT, LINKUSDT or DOGEUSDT spot price/result data was read by prior research before this checkpoint
allowed_fixes: CSV or timestamp parsing including documented 2025 microseconds
fill only archive-missing daily timestamps from official public Spot Kline REST
implementation defects that do not change universe, signals, periods, costs, benchmark or gates
